description_long: This is a conical electric kettle with a wide, stable base that tapers smoothly to a narrower top opening. The body is a uniform light gray, likely made of metal or plastic, and features a single, prominent blue handle attached to one side, ergonomically curved for easy gripping. The handle is textured, providing a secure hold, and is side-mounted, extending from the upper to the lower portion of the kettle. The top opening appears to lack a visible spout or lid, giving the kettle a minimalist, modern appearance. The base is broad and flat, ensuring stability on flat surfaces. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, emphasizing a clean, utilitarian design.
description: A modern, conical electric kettle with a wide gray body and a single blue, textured side handle. The design is minimalist, with no visible spout, lid, or decorative patterns.
description_view_0: The kettle is seen from the front, showing the wide gray body and the blue side handle curving outward.
description_view_1: A direct view of the plain gray body with no handle or features visible, highlighting the conical shape.
description_view_2: The blue handle is fully visible on the right side, attached to the smooth gray body.
description_view_3: The handle is seen from the back, showing its attachment points and textured surface against the plain body.
